name: SuccessFactors, Inc.
description: SAP SuccessFactors is a leading provider of cloud-based human capital management (HCM) software, operating as a subsidiary of the German multinational software corporation SAP. Headquartered in South San Francisco, California, the company specializes in delivering comprehensive solutions for HR, payroll, talent management, and workforce analytics using the software-as-a-service (SaaS) model. By streamlining and optimizing essential human resource processes, SAP SuccessFactors enables organizations worldwide to effectively manage their workforce, improve employee engagement, and drive business performance through integrated, data-driven cloud technology designed to meet the evolving needs of modern global enterprises.
